description: Create an FTS5 virtual table named catalog_fts in the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db) to enable fast text searching across tracks, albums, and artists. The table must include columns TrackId (UNINDEXED), TrackName, AlbumTitle, ArtistName, Composer, and GenreName, populated by joining the tracks, albums, artists, and genres tables. Export search results for 'Iron Maiden', 'blues rock', and 'Bach' to /home/ga/Documents/exports/search_iron_maiden.csv, /home/ga/Documents/exports/search_blues_rock.csv, and /home/ga/Documents/exports/search_bach.csv respectively. Save the complete SQL script used for table creation, population, and searching to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/fts_catalog_setup.sql.
